body:
mod adds the world of varden through the portal in the ancient city
📖WHAT IS THIS MOD?
this mod adds the world of vardens, since in update 1.19 they added the ancient city there was a varden and a portal, without this mod this portal will not work, BUT! this mod will add this function.
(created by a Russian-speaking developer)
!you think: why are there no new updates?
I just don't want this mod to have scalk like copper in new minecraft snapshots, so that it brings something of its own, and not just: scalk armor, scalk tools, scalk golem, if anything I'll try to make additions for this mod in the form of another mod, but in the main mod it won't be.
Thanks for your attention(:!
